info.english_meaning: to take care to nurture to nourish o provide to fill
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 3.4 pF ityatra 'hrasvAnto'yamiti kecit' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti
